text: Increasing the size of the whole eye can increase resolution or sensitivity without having to decrease the other and inversely (Caves et al, 2017).  Eye size, and in particular the eye to body ratio, gives a lot of information about the quality of vision of the individual but also about its lifestyle, e.g : nocturnal or diurnal species (Kirk, 2006). Previous studies of eye design suggest a common organizing principle about how the activity pattern is reflected in the size and shape of the eyes (Hall, 2008).
